raw.subject: Your Decatur page caught my eye, Dukes Glitzy Pawz!
raw.body:
Hi,

I loved the post about Bob and Olive, the cutest brother + sister duo! Their adorable faces really shine in your photos.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers like me wondering how to reach you directly for services.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that captures the spirit of your Facebook posts – a clean showcase for your grooming services, a photo gallery featuring your furry friends, and a clear call-to-action to book grooming services.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/dukes-glitzy-pawz-decatur/

If you're interested in bringing this online, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses – just reply or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
